notes: Walk-forward TimeSeriesSplit with label-horizon purging (Lopez de Prado AFML Ch.10). Two tracks evaluated on identical test rows: (1) ML — RF at production RF_PARAMS, signed score = P(BUY)-P(SELL); (2) Linear — 7-factor Sicilian composite at production FACTOR_WEIGHTS. Cross-sectional IC is Spearman per date averaged across dates (Grinold-Kahn). Unlike trainer.py's CV, this version purges labels that leak into the test fold. aggregate_pooled.{track}.{Nd} additionally carries per_date_dates and per_date_ics — the chronological Spearman-IC series used for regime-conditional analysis, drift detection against live, and higher-moment / Deflated-Sharpe work. Fold entries omit these to keep the JSON compact.
